triggers.name: Evening actuals update
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Evening update — reconcile today's sprint actuals in the spreadsheet and share a summary with the user.

triggers.name: Next week plan check
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Friday check — review next week's outreach plan in the spreadsheet. Flag any days without prep sheets. Suggest segments to prioritize.

triggers.name: Morning sprint briefing
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Morning briefing — check if today's execution sheet is approved. If yes, remind the user it's ready to sprint. If not, nudge for approval.

triggers.name: Post-sprint summary
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Post-sprint check — if a sprint ran today, summarize results (sent/failed/skipped) and update the spreadsheet actuals.
